ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country or territory */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or territory */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country or territory is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country or territory */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the population data */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population figure for the year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Annual growth rate of the population */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density for the given year */,
  "urban_population" INTEGER /* Urban population for the given year */,
  "rural_population" INTEGER /* Rural population for the given year */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate per 1,000 population */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate per 1,000 population */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Net migration rate per 1,000 population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" INTEGER /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Description of the data coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., line chart, bar chart) */,
  "vis_data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the visualization was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the thumbnail image for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data used for the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_countries" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id", "country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_units_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth_rates" (
  "growth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth rate */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_rates_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "percentage_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each percentage change */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the population data */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change in population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_percentage_changes_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES population_data ("data_id")
)
